name: Anesthesia Modifiers (QX/QK)
description: Validation of concurrent anesthesia billing by CRNAs (QX) and Medical Direction (QK).

name: Ambulance - Duplicate Trips
description: Validation of multiple ambulance trips on same day, check locations and history.

name: Therapy - Physical/Occupational
description: Review for duplicate therapy visits (GP, GO) on the same day.

name: Transplant Claims (Optum)
description: Validation of transplant pricing handled by Optum vs standard billing.

name: Orthotics LT/RT
description: Validation of LT/RT modifiers versus bilateral billing in Orthotics.

name: Home Ventilator (E0465/E0466)
description: Review for duplicate home ventilator claims (E0465/E0466).
